Table of Contents

Enum esriPointToRasterMethod

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Point data to Raster methods.

[Guid("BE29F550-FA95-46F1-98BF-D9004BD33F31")]
public enum esriPointToRasterMethod

Fields

esriPointToRasterIDW = 4

4: Use the IDW average Z value of all the points within a Raster cell.

esriPointToRasterNearest = 5

5: Use the Z value of the point that is the closest to the cell center.

esriPointToRasterZaverage = 3

3: Use the average Z value of all the points within a Raster cell.

esriPointToRasterZmax = 2

2: Use the maximum Z value among all the points within a Raster cell.

esriPointToRasterZmin = 1

1: Use the minimum Z value among all the points within a Raster cell.

Made with docfx
